benefits.description: Seeking maximum anti-aging and scar healing with hair/hairline protection

protocol_notes: Year-round GHK-Cu at 5mg initially, recently bumped to 10mg. On HGH. Takes megadose vitamin C (10g daily), zinc daily, Astaxanthin 12mg with Lutein 20mg and Zeaxanthin 1mg. Not concerned about copper toxicity. Considering increasing Astaxanthin to 24mg but concerned about skin discoloration. Middle Eastern ethnicity, sun-exposed from driving.
